content: STCA (Short Term Conflict Alert) per SKYbrary/Wikipedia: ground-based safety net that predicts aircraft trajectories forward over a short look-ahead window (typically ~2 minutes) and alerts when predicted separation will breach minima, firing 50-90s before an actual loss of separation. Real systems tune thresholds per-area (en-route vs TMA) to balance false alerts vs missed detections. For a simulator, a simplified version can just check current+short-horizon linear-extrapolated positions each tick rather than full trajectory prediction.
